sentences.target: Ich suche weiche Wolle für den Schal.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈvaɪçə ˈvɔlə fyːɐ̯ deːn ʃaːl/

translations.de: Ich suche weiche Wolle für den Schal.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈvaɪçə ˈvɔlə fyːɐ̯ deːn ʃaːl/
translations.en: I'm looking for soft wool for the scarf.
translations.es: Busco lana suave para una bufanda.
translations.fr: Je cherche de la laine douce pour une écharpe.
translations.it: Cerco lana morbida per una sciarpa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找柔软的羊毛做围巾。
translations.yue: 我搵緊柔軟嘅羊毛嚟織頸巾。
translations.pt: Estou procurando lã macia para um cachecol.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm len mềm cho khăn choàng.
translations.nl: Ik zoek zachte wol voor een sjaal.
translations.hi: मैं स्कार्फ के लिए मुलायम ऊन ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter myk ull til et skjerf.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari wol yang lembut untuk syal.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter mjuk ull till en halsduk.
translations.ro: Caut lână moale pentru o eșarfă.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter blød uld til et halstørklæde.
translations.ja: マフラー用の柔らかい毛糸を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun; subject of the sentence (nominative).
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes a direct object in the accusative.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Wolle'; inflected to agree with feminine accusative singular.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'suche' (accusative).
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a prepositional object.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Schal' after 'für'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'für' (accusative).

sentences.target: Die Wolle kratzt ein bisschen am Hals.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈvɔlə kʁatst aɪn ˈbɪsçn am hals/

translations.de: Die Wolle kratzt ein bisschen am Hals.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈvɔlə kʁatst aɪn ˈbɪsçn am hals/
translations.en: The wool is a bit scratchy on my neck.
translations.es: La lana me pica un poco en el cuello.
translations.fr: La laine me gratte un peu le cou.
translations.it: La lana mi pizzica un po' sul collo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这羊毛贴在脖子上有点扎。
translations.pt: A lã pinica um pouco no meu pescoço.
translations.vi: Len trên cổ tôi hơi ngứa.
translations.nl: De wol kriebelt een beetje in mijn nek.
translations.hu: A gyapjú kicsit szúrja a nyakamat.
translations.hi: ऊन मेरे गले पर थोड़ी चुभती है.
translations.el: Το μαλλί με τσιμπάει λίγο στον λαιμό.
translations.id: Wol ini agak gatal di leher saya.
translations.ro: Lâna mă înțeaпă puțin la gât.
translations.cs: Vlna mě na krku trochu škrábe.
translations.ja: 羊毛が首に少しチクチクします。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of 'Wolle'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause (nominative).
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive here with an experiencer/locative phrase.
Indefinite article; determiner within the fixed measure expression 'ein bisschen'.
Nominal measure expression used adverbially in 'ein bisschen' to indicate degree ('a little').
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'an' (dative) in the contraction 'am'.

sentences.target: Meine Oma spinnt Wolle am Spinnrad.

translations.de: Meine Oma spinnt Wolle am Spinnrad.
translations.en: My grandma spins wool on a spinning wheel.
translations.es: Mi abuela hila lana en una rueca.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère file la laine au rouet.
translations.it: Mia nonna fila la lana all'arcolaio.
translations.ru: Моя бабушка прядёт шерсть на прялке.
translations.pt: Minha avó fia lã na roca.
translations.he: סבתא שלי טווה צמר בגלגל טוויה.
translations.vi: Bà tôi se len bằng guồng quay sợi.
translations.ar: جدتي تغزل الصوف على عجلة غزل.
translations.nl: Mijn oma spint wol op een spinnewiel.
translations.uk: Моя бабуся пряде вовну на прядці.
translations.hu: A nagymamám gyapjút fon a rokkán.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी चरखे पर ऊन कातती हैं.
translations.pl: Moja babcia przędzie wełnę na kołowrotku.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου γνέθει μαλλί στο ροδάνι.
translations.nb: Bestemor spinner ull på en rokk.
translations.id: Nenek saya memintal wol dengan roda pemintal.
translations.sv: Min mormor spinner ull på en spinnrock.
translations.ro: Bunica mea toarce lână la roata de tors.
translations.cs: Moje babička přede vlnu na kolovratu.
translations.da: Min mormor spinder uld på en rok.
translations.ja: 祖母は糸車で羊毛を紡いでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular agreeing with 'Oma'.
Common noun; subject of the clause (nominative).
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; transitive here, taking 'Wolle' as object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'spinnt' (accusative).
Contraction of 'an dem'; preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative/instrumental setting.
Compound common noun (Spinn+Rad), neuter; object of 'an' (dative) in 'am Spinnrad'.

sentences.target: Du kannst die Wolle bitte entwirren.

translations.de: Du kannst die Wolle bitte entwirren.
translations.fr: S'il te plaît, démêle la laine.
translations.nb: Vær så snill og løs opp garnet.
translations.ja: 毛糸をほどいてください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular personal pronoun; subject (nominative).
Modal auxiliary, present tense, 2nd person singular; selects bare infinitive 'entwirren'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Wolle' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the infinitive 'entwirren' (accusative).
Politeness adverb; sentence-internal pragmatic marker modifying the request.
Bare infinitive lexical verb selected by the modal 'kannst'; governs the object 'die Wolle'.
